name: Trulioo

developer_experience.reason: Global KYC API with good docs

description: Trulioo — Global identity verification platform with document checks, biometric matching, and database verification in 195+ countries.

seo.title: Trulioo — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Trulioo: Trulioo — Global identity verification platform with document checks, biometric matching, and database verification in 195+ countries.

when_to_use: Global identity verification across 195+ countries via one API
Document and biometric verification for fintech KYC
Business verification (KYB) for global marketplace onboarding
Database identity check against 450+ data sources
Age verification for online gambling and adult platform compliance

pros: Document and database verification in 195+ countries
GlobalGateway API covers most regulatory markets
Biometric matching integrated for KYC flows
cons: Coverage depth varies widely country by country
Pricing opaque, sales-led for enterprise deals
Dashboard and DX trail newer upstarts
review.verdict: Default global IDV option when country breadth wins; benchmark country-level accuracy before committing.
review.best_for: Global fintechs and enterprises needing identity verification in dozens of regulated markets
review.not_for: Single-market teams where local specialists deliver deeper, cheaper verification than a global vendor
